## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] Code follows existing style (short functions, explicit errors)
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] New dependencies flagged in the PR description
